items.title_en: Cisco CEO says tech is entering a 'networking supercycle' as stock pops 14% on strong AI demand
items.title_zh: 思科首席执行官表示，科技行业正在进入“网络超级周期”，人工智能需求强劲，股价上涨 14%
items.desc_en: Shares headed for their best day in more than two decades after Cisco blew past its AI infrastructure and hyperscaler orders guidance for the fiscal year
items.desc_zh: 在思科超出其本财年人工智能基础设施和超大规模订单指引后，股价迎来二十多年来最好的一天

items.title_en: Analysts are bullish on this ether accumulator as crypto treasury strategies mature
items.title_zh: 随着加密货币金库策略的成熟，分析师看好这个以太坊累加器
items.desc_en: Digital asset treasury companies are evolving from passive crypto vaults into publicly traded crypto investment managers.
items.desc_zh: 数字资产财务公司正在从被动的加密货币金库演变为公开交易的加密货币投资管理公司。

items.title_en: Why the AI bull market's obsession shifted away from Nvidia to memory chip makers
items.title_zh: 为什么人工智能牛市的关注点从英伟达转向存储芯片制造商
items.desc_en: Behind the surge is an evolving systems architecture for AI known as "orchestration" in which workloads are distributed through multiple processing channels.
items.desc_zh: 激增的背后是一种不断发展的人工智能系统架构，称为“编排”，其中工作负载通过多个处理通道进行分配。

items.title_en: Bessent sees 'substantial disinflation' ahead as Warsh takes over the Fed
items.title_zh: 沃什接任美联储后，贝森特预计未来将出现“大幅通货紧缩”
items.desc_en: Bessent said the energy-fed inflation surge recently is likely to reverse as the U.S. is "going to keep pumping."
items.desc_zh: 贝森特表示，随着美国“将继续加息”，最近由能源驱动的通胀飙升可能会逆转。

items.title_en: Cisco shares are surging double digits. Morgan Stanley thinks the stock is still cheap
items.title_zh: 思科股价飙升两位数。摩根士丹利认为该股仍然便宜
items.desc_en: Cisco has room to run, adding to its double-digit gains this week, as the firm's product orders accelerate due to artificial intelligence, per Morgan Stanley.
items.desc_zh: 摩根士丹利表示，由于人工智能导致该公司的产品订单加速，思科还有上涨空间，本周该股的涨幅进一步扩大至两位数。

items.title_en: Warning of record global temperatures as chance of very strong El Niño grows
items.title_zh: 强烈厄尔尼诺现象的可能性增加，全球气温将创历史新高
items.desc_en: As El Niño develops this year, scientists are increasingly confident it could be one of the strongest on record with global consequences, as Simon King explains.
items.desc_zh: 正如西蒙·金（Simon King）解释的那样，随着今年厄尔尼诺现象的发展，科学家们越来越有信心它可能是有记录以来最强烈的厄尔尼诺现象之一，并对全球产生影响。

items.title_en: 'Floating armoury' ship reportedly seized by Iran

items.title_zh: 法院推翻亚历克斯·默多的谋杀定罪并下令重新审判
items.desc_en: The court has ordered a new trial over the June 2021 killings of Paul and Maggie Murdaugh.
items.desc_zh: 法院已下令对 2021 年 6 月保罗·默多 (Paul Murdaugh) 和玛吉·默多 (Maggie Murdaugh) 被杀事件进行新的审判。

items.title_en: Instants by Instagram
items.title_zh: Instants by Instagram
items.desc_en: Send disappearing, unedited photos to Close Friends
items.desc_zh: 将消失的、未经编辑的照片发送给亲密朋友

items.title_en: PiP Cue
items.title_zh: PiP Cue
items.desc_en: PIP video controls and captions for any site
items.desc_zh: 适用于任何网站的 PIP 视频控件和字幕

items.title_en: Woman isolating on British island in South Pacific after hantavirus contact
items.title_zh: 接触汉坦病毒后，一名妇女在南太平洋英国岛屿上被隔离
items.desc_en: The woman who was on a virus-hit ship shows "no signs of illness", the government of Pitcairn Islands, a British Overseas Territory, says.
items.desc_zh: 英国海外领土皮特凯恩群岛政府表示，在一艘受病毒袭击的船上的妇女“没有任何生病的迹象”。

items.title_en: WhatsApp launches totally private 'incognito' conversations with its AI chatbot
items.title_zh: WhatsApp 与其人工智能聊天机器人推出完全私密的“隐身”对话
items.desc_en: A cyber security expert says deleting chat history could lead to a lack of accountability if things go wrong.
items.desc_zh: 一位网络安全专家表示，如果出现问题，删除聊天记录可能会导致缺乏责任感。

items.title_en: Israeli strikes on cars in southern Lebanon kill 12, health ministry says
items.title_zh: 黎巴嫩卫生部称以色列对黎巴嫩南部汽车的袭击造成 12 人死亡
items.desc_en: Two children are among those reported dead after seven cars were struck in separate attacks south of Beirut.
items.desc_zh: 据报道，贝鲁特以南七辆汽车被撞，造成两名儿童死亡。

items.title_en: Epstein abused me while under house arrest, survivor tells US lawmakers
items.title_zh: 幸存者告诉美国立法者，爱泼斯坦在软禁期间虐待我
items.desc_en: Roza was among several victims who gave testimony to Democratic lawmakers on Tuesday.
items.desc_zh: 罗扎是周二向民主党议员作证的几名受害者之一。

items.title_en: Dozens of dogs rescued and suspect arrested in Uganda after BBC investigation
items.title_zh: 英国广播公司(BBC)调查后，乌干达数十只狗获救，嫌疑人被捕
items.desc_en: A BBC investigation exposed how scammers posted social content of dogs in distress to dupe donors into giving money.
items.desc_zh: 英国广播公司 (BBC) 的一项调查揭露了诈骗者如何发布陷入困境的狗的社交内容，以欺骗捐赠者捐款。

items.title_en: Philippine Senate in lockdown after gunshots fired
items.title_zh: 菲律宾参议院因枪击事件被封锁
items.desc_en: Police commandos entered the building where a senator wanted by the International Criminal Court had sought refuge.
items.desc_zh: 警察突击队进入了一名被国际刑事法院通缉的参议员寻求庇护的大楼。

items.title_en: Suicide forum fined £950,000 for not blocking UK users
items.title_zh: 自杀论坛因未屏蔽英国用户而被罚款 95 万英镑
items.desc_en: The regulator said the forum had not done enough to protect UK users - but critics accuse Ofcom of acting too slowly.
items.desc_zh: 该监管机构表示，该论坛在保护英国用户方面做得不够，但批评者指责 Ofcom 行动太慢。

items.title_en: Stella
items.title_zh: Stella
items.desc_en: Local, open-source AI that automates your Mac
items.desc_zh: 可让您的 Mac 实现自动化的本地开源 AI

items.title_en: Shrinking Milka chocolate bar tricked consumers, says German court
items.title_zh: 德国法院称，缩小的米尔卡巧克力棒欺骗了消费者
items.desc_en: A court in Bremen has found the manufacturer of the classic Alpine Milk chocolate bar guilty of "shrinkflation".
items.desc_zh: 不莱梅一家法院判定经典阿尔卑斯牛奶巧克力棒的制造商犯有“收缩通货膨胀”罪。

items.title_en: Thousands of Waymo robotaxis recalled over risk of entering flooded roads
items.title_zh: 数千辆 Waymo 机器人出租车因存在进入被洪水淹没的道路的风险而被召回
items.desc_en: The voluntary recall follows an incident on 20 April where an empty Waymo car entered a flooded road in San Antonio, Texas.
items.desc_zh: 此次自愿召回是在 4 月 20 日发生的一起事件之后发生的，当时一辆空的 Waymo 汽车进入德克萨斯州圣安东尼奥市一条被洪水淹没的道路。

items.title_en: MobileCLI
items.title_zh: MobileCLI
items.desc_en: Remote AI Terminal Control
items.desc_zh: 远程AI终端控制

items.title_en: DesignMD
items.title_zh: DesignMD
items.desc_en: Turn any website into an AI-ready design system
items.desc_zh: 将任何网站变成人工智能就绪的设计系统

items.title_en: More than 70 million warnings sent to people seeking child abuse material
items.title_zh: 向寻求虐待儿童材料的人们发出了超过 7000 万条警告
items.desc_en: The messages highlight the illegality of what people are searching for online and direct them towards help.
items.desc_zh: 这些消息强调人们在网上搜索的内容是非法的，并引导他们寻求帮助。

items.title_en: Stagent
items.title_zh: Stagent
items.desc_en: Drive Claude Code through long tasks it would otherwise drop
items.desc_zh: 驱动克劳德代码完成长时间的任务，否则它会被丢弃

items.title_en: Smart glasses are 'an invasion of privacy' - Meta's are selling better than ever
items.title_zh: 智能眼镜“侵犯隐私”——Meta 的销量比以往任何时候都好
items.desc_en: The biggest tech firms are set to sell millions of smart glasses despite growing privacy concerns.
items.desc_zh: 尽管隐私问题日益严重，但最大的科技公司仍将销售数百万副智能眼镜。

items.title_en: Open Computer Use
items.title_zh: Open Computer Use
items.desc_en: Open-source Computer Use MCP for AI agents
items.desc_zh: 开源计算机使用 MCP 进行 AI 代理

items.title_en: Tech Life
items.title_zh: 科技生活
items.desc_en: Crumbling roads and other hazards - can AI make our streets safer?
items.desc_zh: 摇摇欲坠的道路和其他危险——人工智能能让我们的街道更安全吗？

items.title_en: Sam Altman: Elon Musk wanted control of OpenAI even after death
items.title_zh: 山姆·奥尔特曼：埃隆·马斯克死后仍想控制 OpenAI
items.desc_en: Sam Altman said Elon Musk tried many times for total control of OpenAI, which he's now suing.
items.desc_zh: 山姆·奥尔特曼表示，埃隆·马斯克曾多次尝试完全控制 OpenAI，目前他正在起诉 OpenAI。

items.title_en: Canvas hack: company pays criminals to delete students' stolen data
items.title_zh: Canvas 黑客：公司付钱给犯罪分子，让他们删除学生被盗的数据
items.desc_en: The company behind Canvas says it has "reached an agreement" with the hackers who disrupted thousands of colleges and universities.
items.desc_zh: Canvas 背后的公司表示，它已经与扰乱数千所学院和大学的黑客“达成协议”。

items.title_en: Texas accuses Netflix of spying on users, including children
items.title_zh: 德克萨斯州指控 Netflix 监视用户，包括儿童
items.desc_en: The lawsuit comes amid increased scrutiny over platform features like auto-play that deliver endless content to users.
items.desc_zh: 此次诉讼发生之际，人们对自动播放等向用户提供无尽内容的平台功能进行了越来越严格的审查。

items.title_en: Ansvisor
items.title_zh: Ansvisor
items.desc_en: Scale your brand visibility across AI answer engines
items.desc_zh: 通过人工智能答案引擎扩展您的品牌知名度

items.title_en: LineageLens
items.title_zh: LineageLens
items.desc_en: AI wrote it. LineageLens proves it.
items.desc_zh: AI写的。 LineageLens 证明了这一点。

items.title_en: Not so dusty: How tech is changing woodworking
items.title_zh: 不那么尘土飞扬：科技如何改变木工
items.desc_en: Woodworking shops have been transformed by tech to make tools safer and more precise.
items.desc_zh: 木工车间已经被技术改造，使工具更安全、更精确。

items.title_en: Sherloq
items.title_zh: Sherloq
items.desc_en: Know which LinkedIn prospect is warm - right now
items.desc_zh: 立即了解哪位 LinkedIn 潜在客户是热情的

items.title_en: TikTok launches £3.99 subscription for no ads in UK
items.title_zh: TikTok 在英国推出 3.99 英镑无广告订阅服务
items.desc_en: Those who don't subscribe will be able to use the platform for free - but be shown personalised ads by default.
items.desc_zh: 那些不订阅的人将能够免费使用该平台 - 但默认情况下会显示个性化广告。

items.title_en: International cyber attack disrupts swathe of universities and schools
items.title_zh: 国际网络攻击扰乱了大片大学和学校
items.desc_en: A hacking group breached the academic software Canvas, used by thousands of schools and universities across the globe.
items.desc_zh: 一个黑客组织入侵了全球数千所学校和大学使用的学术软件 Canvas。

items.title_en: How sunburn inspired a new way to store energy
items.title_zh: 晒伤如何激发了一种储存能量的新方法
items.desc_en: Molecules that can capture heat could be a useful technology to decarbonise heating.
items.desc_zh: 能够捕获热量的分子可能是一种有用的供暖脱碳技术。

items.title_zh: Tendem by Toloka
items.desc_en: AI platform to hand off any task to a human expert
items.desc_zh: 人工智能平台将任何任务交给人类专家

items.desc_zh: Al 睡眠伴侣，帮助您轻松入睡

items.desc_en: A sleep apnoea wearable. Plus, tech to free up hospital beds and a breast health app.
items.desc_zh: 睡眠呼吸暂停可穿戴设备。另外，还有可以腾出医院床位的技术和乳房健康应用程序。

items.desc_zh: 使用 AI 代理直接编辑和调整 UI 像素

items.desc_zh: 通过语音创建您的个人模因以实现全面回忆

items.desc_zh: 具有跨会议记忆的AI会议伴侣
